items.name_en: Still minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported sheepskin drawstring paired with a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining aesthetics and practicality, very roomy. The smooth and glossy sheepskin surface feels premium. Comes with a detachable pouch inside, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions. Full of three-dimensional feel, perfectly interpreting understated and minimalist~
items.name_cn:
Still minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported sheepskin drawstring paired with a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining aesthetics and practicality, very roomy. The smooth and glossy sheepskin surface feels premium. Comes with a detachable pouch inside, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions. Full of three-dimensional feel, perfectly interpreting understated and minimalist~
Style No.: 804302
Size: 26×30×13cm

items.name_en: Suede
items.name_cn:
Suede
GABY MINI Box Bag
The adorable new arrival for the upcoming spring and summer season~ Roseanne Park's matching makeup bag/box bag, featuring suede + unique stitching craftsmanship, double zipper design for easy opening, small body with large capacity, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, also serves as a makeup bag, exquisite and practical, the latest bestseller, well-deserved.
Style: 766731
Size: 18x11x6.5cm

items.name_en: Suede version·
items.name_cn:
Suede version·
CALYPSO_Suede Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian suede, it feels soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic snap closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. The minimalist interior design allows for effortless use!
Size: 38×21×10cm
Model: 777399

specs.rawTitle:

Tan elephant print with gold buckle
niki_28cm is simply too cool, the bag shape is beautiful with no flaws, soft and delicate sheepskin creates a retro yet stylish look. Handheld or crossbody is very doable, full of presence, suitable for both men and women. Fashion meets functionality, comfortable and stylish to wear.
Extra-large capacity perfectly arranged for daily commute and travel👌

Size:28×20.5×8.5cm

LE 37 Bucket Bag Small_

Model: 749036

items.name_en: This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
items.name_cn:
This special name comes from Saint Laurent's first boutique on New York's 57th Street, opened by Mr. Saint Laurent in 1968. Made with original lambskin and quilted craftsmanship, the trapezoidal silhouette with large diamond quilting is simple yet stylish, truly retro and fashionable. The bag exudes its unique charm! The leather is incredibly soft and comfortable, making it irresistible to touch! The adjustable shoulder strap fits different heights and weights. Thoughtful practical details!
Model: 698567
Size: 24x18x5.5cm
